title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Navkar Corporation

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Navkar Corporation
jsonLd.description:
Join the Navkar Corporation family as a Logistics Manager in Coimbatore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Navkar Corporation:
Navkar Corporation is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Vendor Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Navkar Corporation!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
